features.title: Features
features.issueDesc: Certificates are unique. Digital signatures ensure anti-forgery.
features.storeDesc: Using blockchain technology. Ensuring data immutability.
features.verifyDesc: Direct file lookup on the system. Fast, accurate, transparent.

story.missionDesc: InnoGreen CertChain envisions a future where all certificates are verified instantly, transparently, and securely — contributing to a modern, green, and sustainable education system, and increasing the high-quality workforce.
story.aboutDesc: A green certificate management and verification system based on Blockchain and digital signature technology to digitize the entire issuance, storage, and verification process, thereby minimizing fraud, saving operational costs, and protecting the environment by reducing traditional paper certificates.
story.storyDesc: Currently, the issue of fake certificates is increasingly prevalent in educational institutions. Traditional storage and verification processes waste time for both learners and recruiting enterprises. Relying on paper certificates leads to uncontrollable errors and fraud. This is the motivation for the research team to propose a new solution, aiming to improve transparency, accuracy, and efficiency in certificate management.
